name: Docs hub (/docs)
description: Public documentation hub. Adoption-sweep port of docs-hub.spec.ts 'Docs Hub (/docs)' describe block (structural half: main heading + description, the 4 documentation-section cards, the quick-start section). 'loads without 500' is covered by the C8 crawl + run-level HTTP-500 invariant; this spec adds the structural element-presence assertions. Element ids captured from a ci-bot CI element-dump: heading-1-qontinui-documentation is the page H1; the 'New to Qontinui?', 'Documentation Sections', and 'Additional Resources' H2s plus the four section H3s (Qontinui Web / Runner / Python API / Core Concepts) are the stable anchors. Public page. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Docs hub header
states.description: Page H1 + the documentation-sections H2. Ports docs-hub.spec.ts:27/132 (main heading + Documentation Sections heading).

states.name: Documentation section cards
states.description: Representative section-card H3s (Qontinui Web, Qontinui Runner). Ports docs-hub.spec.ts:43 ('shows 4 documentation categories').
